title: UpLift Beyond
description: Server modpack for the uplift beyond smp
body:
# UpLift Beyond  
A carefully curated Minecraft experience that enhances the vanilla gameplay with an exciting mix of Vanilla+ mods.

## 🌌 Mod List

### ⚙️ Performance
🧠 **Sodium** • ⚡ **Sodium Extra** • 🧱 **Lithium** • 💾 **FerriteCore**  
🚀 **ImmediatelyFast** • 🌄 **Distant Horizons** • 🌪️ **Entity & More Culling**  
💤 **Dynamic FPS** • 🧩 **Forge Config API Port** • 🧰 **Konkrete** • ⚙️ **CreativeCore**

---

### 🧩 Core Libraries
🧱 **Fabric API** • 🧶 **Fabric Kotlin** • 📦 **Cloth Config**  
⚙️ **YACL** • 🧠 **Puzzle API** • ✨ **Text Placeholder API**  
🔤 **Language Reload** • 🔍 **CICADA Library**

---

### 🧭 Gameplay & UI
🎙️ **Simple Voice Chat** • 🎮 **Controlify** • 🧭 **Essential Mod**  
🪄 **FancyMenu** • ⚙️ **Mod Menu** • 💬 **More Chat History**  
🧰 **Mouse Tweaks** • 🔍 **Zoomify** • 🗺️ **Xaero’s Map**  
📜 **Paginated Advancements** • 💡 **Shulker Tooltip** • 🪑 **Sit**  
🐎 **Better Mount HUD** • ⚡ **FastQuit** • 🗨️ **Chat Heads**  
🎯 **Ping Wheel** • 💾 **YOSBS** • 🖥️ **Main Menu Credits** • 🌍 **Cherished Worlds**

---

### 🌈 Visuals & Atmosphere
☀️ **Iris Shaders** • 💡 **LambDynamicLights** • 🌫️ **Blur+**  
🌿 **BetterGrassify** • 🔆 **Gamma Utils** • 🔊 **Sound Physics**  
🎧 **AmbientSounds** • 🔥 **Presence Footsteps** • 💨 **Particle Rain** • 🌆 **Continuity**
